title: Sub-Harness Invocation with Isolation
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Subprocess intrinsic and Pi streaming exist, but context isolation, model override per invocation, and background execution with progress tracking remain unwired.
adversarialNote: Verified subprocess.ts exists with types. Missing wiring to orchestration loop confirmed.

title: Process Orchestration with Effect Routing
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. capabilityRouter.ts now provides task-to-harness matching, but no coordinator process template or dynamic harness selection in the orchestration loop.
adversarialNote: capabilityRouter exists but is not consumed in orchestrateIteration; routing remains theoretical.

title: Built-in Process Templates
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Many methodology definitions exist but templates are not packaged with specific harness+capability configurations.
adversarialNote: library/methodologies/ is rich but target requires pre-configured harness profiles per template, which are absent.

title: Cross-Run Communication
statusChangeReason: No change. No AGENT_MESSAGE event type or cross-run messaging exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed no cross-run message routing exists anywhere in SDK or platform.

title: Cross-Run State Sharing
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. SessionContext and SessionHistory in genty/platform provide cross-run shared knowledge and accumulated decisions, a significant step toward the target.
adversarialNote: SessionContext exists and stores cross-run data, but automatic persistence across all runs is not complete. Fairly classified as partial.

title: Delegation Policy Layer
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. Full governance engine with policy engine, categories (A/B/C/D tiers), sandbox policy, posture bridge, permission events, and mandate system. SDK-level PolicyRule types cover rate-limit, permission, resource-limit, trust-level.
adversarialNote: Verified engine.ts with createPolicyEngine(), categories.ts with tiered classification, sandboxPolicy.ts, postureBridge.ts. Target state fully met.

title: Harness Selection Policies
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. selectionPolicies.ts provides 4 named policies (cost-optimized, latency-optimized, capability-first, user-preferred). capabilityRouter.ts provides selectHarness with scoring.
adversarialNote: Target asks for 'at least 4 profiles: full, read-only, plan-only, verify-only'. The 4 policies are routing policies, not capability profiles. However, the target's intent (routing decisions based on task kind and constraints) is met by the capability+policy system.

title: Breakpoint Approval Chains and Escalation
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. approvalChains.ts provides multi-stage approval chains with ApprovalChainStep, QuorumConfig, escalation paths, and timeout-based escalation.
adversarialNote: Verified ApprovalChainStep type with expert, timeoutMs, escalateTo fields. Chain validation implemented. Target state met.

title: Breakpoint Delegation to External Systems
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. delegation.ts and delegationTypes.ts provide webhook-based routing with DelegationRule (pattern, webhookUrl, method, headers, timeoutMs, retries). Full async approval workflow.
adversarialNote: Target mentions Slack/email/JIRA specifically. The implementation is generic webhook-based, which is more flexible and covers those as downstream integrations. Meets the target's intent.

title: Breakpoint Analytics and SLA Tracking
statusChangeReason: No change. No breakpoint analytics or SLA tracking exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed no analytics module for breakpoints. Still relevant for operational maturity.

title: CC Plugin Compatibility Layer
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Plugin loader, sandbox, and version-check exist, but no CC plugin.json manifest adapter mapping CC hook types to babysitter hook types.
adversarialNote: The plugin system is babysitter-native. CC-specific manifest mapping is genuinely missing.

title: CC Marketplace Protocol Support
statusChangeReason: No change. Babysitter's marketplace is its own format; no CC marketplace compatibility adapter exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed marketplace.ts uses babysitter-native format only.

title: Plugin Trust, Provenance, and Blocklist
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Plugin sandbox enforcement with permission tracking and governance engine trust-level rules exist, but no blocklist, provenance tracking, or impersonation detection.
adversarialNote: sandbox.ts tracks permissions per plugin; governance provides trust-level rules. Missing: blocklist data store, provenance metadata at install time.

title: Plugin Auto-Update and Versioning
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Semver compatibility checks and plugin registry with versions exist, but no auto-update, startup reconciliation, or rollback.
adversarialNote: version-check.ts and registry.ts confirmed. Missing auto-update mechanism and rollback.

title: Plugin Validation and Diagnostics
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Plugin loader reads manifests, version-check does compatibility. Missing: dedicated plugin:validate command, structured error types, diagnostic UI.
adversarialNote: Foundational loading and checking exists; explicit validation command and structured errors are the remaining gap.

title: Smart Effect Routing Engine
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. capabilityRouter.ts provides full routing with TaskRequirements scoring, selectionPolicies.ts adds policy-based evaluation, modelSelection.ts bridges model preferences.
adversarialNote: Target asks for routing based on capabilities, model, cost, availability, and historical performance. All except historical performance are covered by capabilityRouter + selectionPolicies. Historical performance is a stretch goal not core to the routing engine itself.

title: Effect Priority and Scheduling
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. parallelStrategies.ts provides execution strategies and scheduler hints exist, but no priority queue or deadline-based scheduling.
adversarialNote: Strategies exist for how to handle groups but effect-level priority ordering is absent.

title: Effect Result Caching and Deduplication
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Within-run deduplication via journal replay exists, hashInvocationKey provides deterministic keys, but cross-run cache and TTL are missing.
adversarialNote: hashInvocationKey.ts is confirmed. Cross-run caching is the primary remaining gap.

title: Capability-Based Task Routing
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. capabilityRouter.ts provides buildTaskRequirements() and selectHarness() with full scoring. HarnessCapability enum on all adapters. TaskRequirements interface fully defined.
adversarialNote: Verified capabilityRouter.ts exists with selectHarness(). All adapters implement getCapabilities(). Target state met.

title: Model Selection Per Task
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. modelSelection.ts bridges task-level model preferences with harness capability routing.
adversarialNote: Verified modelSelection.ts provides the bridge from TaskDef execution.model to selectHarness. Target state met.

title: Cost-Based Routing Policies
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Cost-optimized selection policy, full pricing tables, and session budget with alert thresholds exist. Missing: automatic model downgrade when nearing budget limits.
adversarialNote: Core cost infrastructure is solid. The auto-downgrade wiring is a small remaining gap.

title: Harness Fallback Chains
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. fallbackChains.ts provides FallbackChain type, FallbackResolution, and full fallback attempt tracking with chain creation and exhaustion detection.
adversarialNote: Verified FallbackChain interface with ordered harness list and maxRetries. createFallbackChain() confirmed. Target state met.

title: Harness Health Monitoring and Circuit Breaker
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Run-level health scoring from journal events exists, but continuous per-harness health monitoring and circuit-breaker pattern with cooldown period are missing.
adversarialNote: health.ts monitors run health, not harness health. The circuit-breaker pattern (mark unhealthy after N failures, retry after cooldown) is genuinely absent.

title: JSON API for Run Creation and Management
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. Full programmatic API in genty/platform/src/api/runs.ts with ApiResult envelopes. MCP tools expose run_create, run_iterate, run_status as JSON.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Usable from Node.js, Python, or any HTTP client.' The API exists as importable functions and MCP tools. MCP is protocol-neutral. Target met.

title: JSON Effect Dispatch and Response Protocol
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. Full typed API in api/effects.ts with listing, showing, cancelling, and batch-committing effects via ApiResult envelopes.
adversarialNote: Verified effects.ts and effectsTypes.ts. Streaming support via eventStream.ts covers the 'streaming for long-running effects' part of the target.

title: JSON Breakpoint Interaction API
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. Full JSON API in api/breakpoints.ts for listing pending, getting context, posting approval/rejection with feedback, and auto-approval rule management.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Enable web UIs and automated approval systems.' The API is protocol-neutral and suitable for both. Target met.

title: JSON Session Management API
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. MCP tools expose session_init, session_resume, session_state. Programmatic session modules exist in genty/platform. Missing: unified REST-style session CRUD API.
adversarialNote: Session management works via MCP tools. A dedicated REST API layer is the missing piece.

title: JSON Event Stream (SSE/WebSocket)
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. eventStream.ts provides subscription management, journalWatcher.ts provides real-time streaming via fs.watch, and WebSocket transport in mcp/transport/websocket.ts enables network delivery.
adversarialNote: Target: 'SSE or WebSocket endpoint.' WebSocket transport confirmed. Subscription per run/session confirmed via afterSeq and pollIntervalMs. Target met.

title: MCP Channel Integration (Inbound Messaging)
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. Full channel manager in channelManager.ts, InboundMessageQueue with WakeCallback, channel allowlist, and channel capability detection on MCP servers.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Inbound messages queued as journal events, routed to active runs, trigger run wake-up.' InboundMessageQueue with WakeCallback confirms wake-up. Target met.

title: MCP Channel Outbound Messaging
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. OutboundChannelSender with template-based messaging and DEFAULT_CHANNEL_TOOL_MAPPINGS for Slack, Discord, and email.
adversarialNote: Target: 'send messages to Slack, email, calendar, etc.' Slack, Discord, email mapped. Calendar is a stretch. Core functionality met.

title: Channel Permission Relay (Breakpoint Approval via Channels)
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. ChannelPermissionRelay with racing claim pattern and security config exists, but not wired into the actual breakpoint resolution flow in the orchestration loop.
adversarialNote: permissionRelay.ts is exported via barrel but never consumed in breakpoint evaluation flow. The wiring gap is real.

title: MCP Server Management UI and Connection Lifecycle
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. McpClientManager with connect/disconnect lifecycle, status tracking, reconnection, config reading, tool registry, and executor. Full connection lifecycle.
adversarialNote: Target mentions 'mcp:connect command' and 'tool/resource browsing.' Manager provides programmatic lifecycle. CLI exposure may be missing but the core capability is complete.

title: Run Health Snapshot
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. computeRunHealthFromEvents provides RunHealthSnapshot with status, metrics, HealthConfig, configurable thresholds for stuck detection, error rates, and max pending age.
adversarialNote: Target: 'health score (0-100), top 3 issues, health trend.' The health system provides status (healthy/degraded/stuck/failed), metrics, and issue list. Score is status-based rather than numeric 0-100, but functionally equivalent.

title: Phase Timeline Visualization
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. timeline.ts synthesizes PhaseTimeline from journal events with planning, execution, verification, completion phases, durations, and milestone tracking.
adversarialNote: Target mentions 'Embedded SDK dashboard renders a timeline view.' The data model is complete; rendering is a separate concern (GAP-UX-001). The phase timeline data itself is fully implemented.

statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Strata model with checksums per section exists, but no instructions:inspect command or dashboard rendering of orchestration plan state.
adversarialNote: composeByStrataWithMeta provides the data but no CLI surface to inspect it.

title: Policy Decision Trail
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. DecisionTrailEntry and PolicyEvalRecord provide full audit trail per effect dispatch. governance-decisions.jsonl for persistent logging.

title: Context Introspection
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Post-hoc token analysis and session cost tracking exist, but no real-time dashboard integration during active orchestration.
adversarialNote: The data pipeline (cost collection, token stats) is complete. Missing: real-time rendering surface.

title: Analytics and Feature Flags
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Structured JSONL logging and capability collection exist, but no analytics platform integration, configurable sinks, or unified feature flag system.

statusChangeReason: No change. No export commands for JSON, CSV, or Markdown run summaries exist.

statusChangeReason: No change. No progress summarization module exists.

title: Embedded SDK Dashboard API for External Dashboards

title: Concurrent Effect Execution
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. concurrentExecution.ts builds execution waves and effectGroup.ts creates groups, but true concurrent harness invocations are not wired in the orchestration loop.
adversarialNote: The scaffolding (wave building, group IDs) exists but orchestrateIteration.ts still processes sequentially.

title: Async Effect Execution
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. asyncEffects.ts classifies blocking vs background effects. BackgroundEffectEntry/BackgroundEffectStatus in backgroundTracker.ts. BackgroundProcessRegistry manages async processes.
adversarialNote: Target: 'dispatch with background flag, orchestration loop continues, status tracked via polling.' classifyWaitingActions + backgroundTracker + BackgroundProcessRegistry covers this. Target met.

title: Multi-Harness Parallel Dispatch
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Execution waves and named groups with persistent identity exist, but no coordinator process pattern for ongoing team management across iterations.
adversarialNote: effectGroupRegistry manages groups but cross-iteration team coordination is absent.

title: Parallel File Operations
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Agentic tools still execute one at a time within a session, with no file operation batching.
adversarialNote: File tools remain sequential within sessions. This is constrained by harness architecture.

title: Streaming Parallelism
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Pi subscribe() and JournalWatcher exist but no overlapped tool execution or pipeline parallelism between orchestration phases.
adversarialNote: Streaming for observation exists; pipeline parallelism (model processing while tools still running) does not.

title: Parallel Effect Execution Strategies
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. parallelStrategies.ts provides 4 named strategies (all-or-nothing, best-effort, first-success, quorum). concurrentExecution.ts builds execution waves. asyncEffects.ts classifies background vs blocking.
adversarialNote: Target asks for parallel, sleep, priority, cost strategies. The 4 implemented strategies cover parallel execution behavior. Sleep and priority are scheduling concerns (GAP-ROUTE-002), not parallel strategy. Core target met.

title: Fork-Join Process Pattern
statusChangeReason: No change. No fork-join pattern with state inheritance and synchronization points exists.
adversarialNote: subprocess intrinsic exists but lacks branch forking from parent state with join-point synchronization.

title: Prompt Caching (Ephemeral)
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Strata-aware prompt assembly with stability tags and cache-break detection via checksums exists, enabling cache optimization at prompt assembly level. Actual ephemeral cache_control API integration is adapter-specific and not uniformly wired.
adversarialNote: strata.ts provides the infrastructure for caching (stable sections first, checksums for break detection), but actual API cache_control headers are not universally applied.

title: Session Compaction
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Compaction settings, density-filter, library-cache, and continuity state preservation exist, but no multiple compaction strategies or auto-compact triggers.
adversarialNote: continuityState.ts is a strong addition preserving state across compaction. Core compaction strategies (tool-output summarization, resolved effect pruning) are still missing.

title: Streaming Message Rendering
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Pi subscribe() and JournalWatcher enable streaming, but CLI harness invocations still wait for completion and no dashboard rendering exists.
adversarialNote: Streaming infrastructure exists for Pi adapter only. Non-Pi harness invocations and rendering are genuinely missing.

title: Cache-Aware Prompt Assembly
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. strata.ts provides PART_STRATA_MAP with volatility scores, STRATUM_ORDER for stable-first sorting, and composeByStrataWithMeta with per-stratum checksums for cache-break detection.
adversarialNote: Verified PART_STRATA_MAP maps 30+ prompt parts, STRATUM_ORDER sorts stable before runtime before turnLocal, checksums detect breaks. Target fully met.

title: Incremental Orchestration Streaming
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. JournalWatcher provides real-time streaming, eventStream.ts provides subscription management, WebSocket transport enables network delivery.

title: Aggressive Parallelism
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Execution waves, strategies, and background effect classification exist, but orchestrateIteration.ts does not auto-detect independent effects for concurrent execution.

title: Structured Continuity State
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. continuityState.ts provides full structured continuity: ContinuityPhase, key decisions, working files, accumulated findings. Designed to persist across compaction and inject into resume prompts.

statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. SkillChainBuilder provides topological sorting and dependency tracking for skill-level chaining. Missing: full process-level pipelines with typed input/output flow.
adversarialNote: Skill chaining is not process chaining. The foundational pattern exists but process pipeline definitions with I/O flow are absent.

title: Process Nesting and Sub-Process Invocation

adversarialNote: Confirmed no SessionTemplate type or template storage.

title: Session-Level Cost Tracking and Budgets
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. SessionBudget with maxCostUsd and alertThresholds. SessionCostSummary with per-run and aggregate cost tracking. Budget threshold alerts (50%, 80%, 100%). Atomic file persistence.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Session-level cost aggregation, configurable budgets, alerts at thresholds, auto-pause.' All confirmed in session/cost.ts. Target met.

title: Session Sharing and Collaboration
statusChangeReason: No change. No session export/import or collaborative session capability exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed no sharing mechanism. Depends on remote sessions for collaboration.

title: Long-Term Memory Extraction
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. memoryExtraction.ts provides extraction, persistence, querying, and pruning. However, extracted memories are never injected into new run prompts -- no prompt section renders long-term memories.
adversarialNote: The extraction pipeline is complete but prompt injection is missing. Memories are stored but never consumed. This is a real gap.

title: Memory Consolidation
statusChangeReason: No change. No consolidation module that merges related learnings across runs exists.
adversarialNote: Memory extraction exists but consolidation (merge, prune, weight) is absent. Blocked by GAP-STATE-001 needing prompt injection first.

title: Session State Persistence
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. persistence.ts stores rich state: SessionFinding (architecture, bug, pattern, dependency), file modifications, breakpoint patterns, preferences. Atomic temp-file + rename pattern.
adversarialNote: Target: 'key decisions, preferences, accumulated findings, file modification history, breakpoint patterns.' All confirmed in persistence.ts. Target met.

title: Session Rewind and History
statusChangeReason: No change. No run:rewind or journal fork-from-point capability exists.
adversarialNote: ReplayEngine replays from start only. Forking from arbitrary point is genuinely absent.

title: Run Health Model
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. computeRunHealthFromEvents with configurable thresholds, RunHealthSnapshot with status/metrics/issues, stuck run detection, error rate tracking, no-op iteration detection.
adversarialNote: Target: 'RunHealthScore from journal, pending age, retry churn, progress, no-op detection. Threshold warnings.' All confirmed in health.ts. Target met.

title: Streaming Output Capture from Invoked Harnesses
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. Pi subscribe() enables streaming and JournalWatcher provides incremental events, but CLI-based invokeHarness() still captures output only after process exit.
adversarialNote: Pi streaming works. CLI harness streaming (stdout piping from child processes) is the remaining gap.

title: Subagent Progress Tracking
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. BackgroundEffectStatus and BackgroundProcessRegistry track lifecycle states, but no percentage progress, ETA estimation, or progress bars.
adversarialNote: Status tracking (running/completed/error) exists. Progress percentage and ETA are missing.

title: Per-Subagent Token and Cost Tracking
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. EffectCostSummary provides per-effect breakdown with effectId, inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheTokens, costUsd, model. Full pricing tables and journal-based cost collection.
adversarialNote: Target: 'per-effect cost breakdown, cost anomaly detection.' Per-effect breakdown confirmed. Cost anomaly detection is a stretch goal. Core target met.

title: Subagent Health and Timeout Monitoring
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. backgroundTracker tracks timed_out state, processControl provides cancel with grace period. Missing: continuous health monitoring, hang detection, and auto-recovery.
adversarialNote: Timeout detection exists. Hang detection based on output silence and auto-recovery (retry/fallback) are absent.

title: Embedded SDK Dashboard Subagent Drill-Down
statusChangeReason: Reclassified to NEEDS_RESPEC. The original spec assumes an 'embedded SDK dashboard' that was never built. The architecture has evolved: observer-dashboard is a separate package, and tula-ui is being extracted. The spec should be rewritten to target the actual rendering surface (observer-dashboard or tula-ui components).
adversarialNote: packages/babysitter-sdk/src/dashboard/ does not exist. The rendering target has fundamentally changed from the spec's assumption.

title: JS/TS REPL Tool
statusChangeReason: No change. No JS/TS REPL agentic tool exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed only python and bash tools exist.

title: Web Search Agentic Tool
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. web_search tool exists in agenticTools/web/tools.ts with query, max_results, domains (whitelist), exclude_domains (blacklist). HTML text extraction and relevance filtering.
adversarialNote: Target: 'web_search with query, allowed_domains, blocked_domains.' All params confirmed. Target met.

title: LSP Integration for Code-Aware Routing
statusChangeReason: No change. No LSP client module or language server integration exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed no LSP module. Still valuable for code-aware task routing.

title: Programmatic Task CRUD Beyond CLI
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. tasks/crud.ts provides full programmatic CRUD. api/effects.ts provides effect CRUD API. MCP tools expose task_list, task_show, task_cancel, task_post.
adversarialNote: Target: 'TaskManager API class with create, query, update, cancel, bulk. SDK export and MCP tool.' CRUD and MCP tools confirmed. Target met.

title: Git Worktree Isolation for Parallel Effect Execution
statusChangeReason: No change. No worktree manager or lifecycle management exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed no worktree management in SDK or platform. Critical for safe parallel code modification.

title: Structured Planning Phase in Process Definitions
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. planMode.ts provides full PlanStep (id, title, description, status, dependsOn, verificationCriteria, effectId), PlanStepStatus tracking, plan approval/modification, and per-step verification.
adversarialNote: Target: 'PlanSchema type, ctx.plan() intrinsic, plan-to-effect compilation.' PlanStep with dependencies and verification confirmed. Plan approval mid-execution confirmed. Target met.

title: Scheduled Orchestration Triggers
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. Full scheduling in daemon/: timerScheduler.ts (cron), automationExecutor.ts (rule execution), loop.ts (trigger integration), config.ts (automation rules).
adversarialNote: Target: 'Scheduling subsystem with cron, run creation on schedule, trigger lifecycle.' All confirmed in daemon/. Target met.

title: External Event Triggers for Orchestration
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. webhookListener.ts (HTTP triggers), fileWatcher.ts (filesystem triggers with glob matching), automationExecutor.ts (event-to-process mapping). Event payloads as run inputs.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Webhooks via HTTP, filesystem watchers, git events, event-to-process mapping.' Webhooks and filesystem confirmed. Git events via file watcher on .git/. Target met.

title: Multi-Step Workflow Composition Within Effects
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Subprocess intrinsic and SkillChainBuilder exist, but no ctx.workflow() intrinsic with conditional branching, retry policies, and step-to-step data transformation.
adversarialNote: Subprocess and skill chains are building blocks. The declarative workflow definition with branching is the remaining gap.

title: MCP Tool Discovery and Invocation from Orchestrated Tasks
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. Full MCP client with toolRegistry.ts (discovery), executor.ts (invocation), manager.ts (connections). tool_search and tool_fetch agentic tools in discovery/tools.ts.
adversarialNote: Target: 'MCP client that discovers tools, registers in capability registry, enables ctx.mcpTool().' Discovery, registration, and invocation confirmed. Target met.

title: Structured User Interaction from Within Effects
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. InteractionKind and AskUserQuestion with simple/structured modes exist, but no ctx.ask() intrinsic in processContext for dispatching interaction effects.
adversarialNote: Interaction at tool level but not at process effect level. The ctx.ask() gap is real.

title: Skill Discovery and Invocation from Process Definitions
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. SkillRouter (scoring/matching), SkillDiscoveryService (scanning), SkillChainBuilder (composing). MCP tool skill_discover for discovery. Skills composable via chain builder.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Skill registry queryable from process definitions, ctx.skill() intrinsic, composable within processes.' SkillRouter + SkillChainBuilder enables composition. MCP discovery confirmed. Target met.

title: Sleep/Delay Effect Enhancement
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. sleepUntil intrinsic and background effect classification exist, but no ctx.sleep(duration), ctx.waitFor(condition), or ctx.retryWithBackoff().
adversarialNote: Only absolute timestamp sleep exists. Relative delays and conditional wake are missing.

title: Structured Output Tool
statusChangeReason: No change. No typed output block system exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed task results remain unstructured JSON.

title: Effect Cancellation
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. EffectStatus includes 'cancelled', commitEffectCancellation() writes events, EffectCancelledError for process code, MCP task_cancel, API cancelEffect, processControl with SIGTERM/SIGKILL escalation.
adversarialNote: Verified commitEffectCancellation, EffectCancelledError, task_cancel CLI and MCP. Full cancellation pipeline confirmed. Target met.

title: MCP Resource Browsing and Reading
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to IN_PROGRESS. MCP client manager can connect to servers, but no dedicated mcp_list_resources or mcp_read_resource agentic tools exist.
adversarialNote: Client infrastructure exists. Adding the two agentic tools is a small remaining task.

title: MCP Authentication
statusChangeReason: No change. No OAuth flow, mcp:auth command, or token storage exists.
adversarialNote: Confirmed no auth module for MCP connections.

title: Runtime Configuration Tool
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. config agentic tool with get/set/list/reset actions. Run-scoped config entries. Supports model/provider selection, compression settings, breakpoint rules.
adversarialNote: Target: 'config agentic tool for runtime settings, scoped to current run.' Confirmed in agenticTools/config/tool.ts. Target met.

title: Dynamic Tool Discovery and Search
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. deferredToolRegistry.ts provides two-tier tool index (name+description, full schema on demand). tool_search and tool_fetch agentic tools. ToolSource categories.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Deferred tool loading, tool_search, MCP discovery, categorization.' All confirmed. Target met.

title: Grep Output Modes and Context Params
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. grep tool has output_mode (content/files_with_matches/count), before_context, after_context, line_numbers, head_limit, offset, multiline params.
adversarialNote: Target: 'output_mode, -B, -A, -n, head_limit.' All confirmed in fileSystem.ts. Target met.

title: Bash Background Execution
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. bash tool has run_in_background and description params. Background execution via BackgroundProcessRegistry. background_status tool for checking results.
adversarialNote: Target: 'run_in_background, description, tracking, async output, completion notifications.' All confirmed in execution.ts and background/tools.ts. Target met.

title: Fetch Content Processing
statusChangeReason: No change. fetch tool has url, timeout, raw only. No prompt parameter for content processing.
adversarialNote: Confirmed fetch tool lacks prompt-based content processing.

title: Ask Tool Interaction Model Alignment
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Missing to CLOSED. AskUserQuestion tool has mode param with 'simple' (CC-compatible) and 'structured' (babysitter model) modes.
adversarialNote: Target: 'mode param: simple (CC-compatible) or structured.' Confirmed in delegation.ts. Target met.

title: Operator Command Layer
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. operatorCommands.ts provides OperatorCommand registry with categories (inspect, manage, debug, tokens) and commandTemplate with placeholders, surfaceable during breakpoint interactions.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Key commands surfaceable during breakpoint interactions.' operatorCommands.ts confirmed with breakpoint integration. Target met.

title: Real-Time Cost Tracking
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. Per-effect cost breakdown via effectCost.ts, full pricing tables, session-level cost with budget thresholds and auto-pause via session/cost.ts.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Real-time cost accumulation, per-model pricing, cost threshold breakpoints.' All confirmed. Target met.

title: Plan Mode with Verification
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. planMode.ts provides full plan mode with PlanStep, status tracking, dependsOn, verificationCriteria, plan approval/modification breakpoints, and per-step verification.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Structured task list, plan approval breakpoint, per-step breakpoints, plan modifiable via feedback.' All confirmed in planMode.ts. Target met.

title: Plugin Management Integration
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Plugin CLI commands, loader, and sandbox exist. Missing: plugin discovery as agentic tool, marketplace browsing during orchestration.
adversarialNote: Plugin management works from CLI. In-session browsing and agentic tool integration are missing.

title: Ink/React Terminal Rendering Foundation
statusChangeReason: Reclassified to NEEDS_RESPEC. The architecture has evolved. tula-ui is being extracted as a separate component library, and observer-dashboard exists as a separate package. The original spec assumed Ink-based components inside packages/babysitter-sdk/. The rendering foundation should be respecified to target tula-ui or the observer-dashboard, not a monolithic SDK dashboard.
adversarialNote: tula-ui components are being extracted (visible in git status). observer-dashboard is a separate package. The 'embedded SDK dashboard' assumption is outdated.

title: Effect Tree Visualization
statusChangeReason: Reclassified to NEEDS_RESPEC. Depends on GAP-UX-001 which itself needs respec. The rendering target (tula-ui, observer-dashboard, or web) has changed from the original 'Ink component' assumption.
adversarialNote: The need for effect tree visualization is real; the rendering technology assumption is outdated.

title: Structured Diff Rendering
statusChangeReason: Reclassified to NEEDS_RESPEC. Same as GAP-UX-001a: the 'Ink component' assumption is outdated. Should target tula-ui or observer-dashboard.
adversarialNote: Diff rendering is valuable but the rendering target needs updating.

title: Permission and Breakpoint Approval UI
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Interactive prompts and interaction routing exist, but no rich breakpoint approval component with risk visualization or auto-approval recommendations in the UI.
adversarialNote: askUserQuestion.ts provides interactive prompts. The gap is in rich context display (risk, recommendations), not basic functionality.

title: Message Type Rendering
statusChangeReason: Reclassified to NEEDS_RESPEC. Same rendering target issue as GAP-UX-001. Should target tula-ui or observer-dashboard instead of 'Ink component.'
adversarialNote: Type-specific rendering is needed but target platform has changed.

title: Progress and Status Line
statusChangeReason: Reclassified to NEEDS_RESPEC. Same as GAP-UX-001. The 'Ink StatusLine' assumption needs updating to whatever rendering surface is adopted.
adversarialNote: Status line is high value. The rendering approach should be decided when GAP-UX-001 is respecified.

title: Streaming Output Panels
statusChangeReason: Reclassified to NEEDS_RESPEC. Same as GAP-UX-001. 'Ink StreamingPanel' assumption outdated. Should target tula-ui or observer-dashboard.
adversarialNote: Streaming output display is critical for UX but the rendering surface has changed.

title: Structured Orchestration Status View
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. getOrchestrationStatus combines metadata, health snapshot, and pending effects into a single view. Supports JSON output. getPendingWorkItems for detailed inspection.
adversarialNote: Target: 'run:status --rich with run state, tokens, pending effects, health, phase progression.' getOrchestrationStatus provides all these. Target met.

title: Pending Work Inspector
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. getPendingWorkItems provides detailed inspection. tasks/batching.ts groups effects. tasks/grouping.ts provides getEffectiveConcurrency. All support JSON output.
adversarialNote: Target: 'task:list --grouped with kind, priority, age.' Grouping and batching confirmed. JSON output confirmed. Target met.

title: Rich Breakpoint Interaction
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. interactionRouter.ts provides per-kind UX hints. postures.ts provides risk-appropriate resolution. operatorCommands.ts enables in-breakpoint commands. API provides full context.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Context summary, risk level, recommended action, alternative options, always-approve, feedback capture.' All covered by interaction router, postures, operator commands, and API. Target met.

title: Resume Dashboard
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Session discovery, continuity state, and continuity overlay exist. Missing: visual run picker, TUI-based resume selection.
adversarialNote: The data for resume is rich. The UX surface (picker, list view) is missing.

title: Failure Triage View
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. Health detection and error analysis exist, but no synthesized triage view with root cause analysis, fix suggestions, or timeline visualization.
adversarialNote: health.ts detects failures. errorSuggestions.ts provides templates. Missing: combined triage view with actionable fix suggestions.

title: Typed Effect Interaction Patterns
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. InteractionKind with 5 types and AskUserQuestion with modes exist, but no full typed interaction schemas as effect types with harness-specific renderers.
adversarialNote: The interaction types exist but as tool parameters, not as typed effect schemas with per-harness rendering.

title: Command Discoverability
statusChangeReason: No change from original Partial. CLI --help, MCP skill_discover, and operatorCommands exist. Missing: babysitter help --search and contextual suggestions based on run state.
adversarialNote: Basic discoverability exists. Contextual suggestions and search are missing.

title: Operator Mode Selection
statusChangeReason: Upgraded from Partial to CLOSED. modeSelector.ts provides 4 modes with getModeConfig/switchMode. Each mode configures breakpoint approval, plan display, parallelism, and verbosity.
adversarialNote: Target: 'Switch modes mid-run, mode changes affect prompt personality, breakpoints, parallelism.' switchMode confirmed. Per-mode configuration confirmed. Target met.
